chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ الْهَدْيِ وَ مَا يَجُوزُ مِنْهُ وَ مَا لَا يَجُوزُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 181 – What is recommended from the sacrificial animal, and what is allowed from it, and what is not allowed

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/165)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/165)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ

text: الْكَبْشُ فِي أَرْضِكُمْ أَفْضَلُ مِنَ الْجَزُورِ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The ram in your land is superior than the camel’.
en.sarwar: 8. Aban has narrated from ‘Abd al- Rahman who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘In your land a ram is more preferred than al-Jazur (camel).”’
